block_00: New reads and cool tournaments inside!
block_04: For starters, we’d like to make a striking announcement! This year, IQ Option sponsors one of the greatest e-sport events of 2021 — CS:GO Latin America Cup. The championship kicked off in November and is now in full swing. The event is held among 12 invited teams from Latin American countries. CS teams from Argentina, Brazil and Paraguay compete throughout the month for a great prize pool worth 255,000 BRL! The CS:GO Latin America Cup final will take place on December 4, at Jeunesse Arena in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.

block_08: Many traders choose breakout trading as their preferred strategy, because it gives them the chance of catching and riding a long trend wave. Check our tips and learn how to find and confirm a breakout and prevent certain mistakes.

block_14: Choosing stocks for trading or investing can be a hard task, especially if you don’t know how to evaluate them. Learn about such performance indicators like EPS, P/E ratio, PEG and more. This guide will instantly teach you to tell promising companies from the rest.
block_16: Most Profitable Trade of the Week
block_42: There is a widespread belief that Americans keep their savings in stocks and ETFs. However, according to a Gallup survey, only 55% of Americans own stocks. The research has been carried out since 1998, with average replies’ statistics ranging between 52% and 67%.
